# 搜一搜 实时搜微信指数类目

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/web_search:
    post:
      summary: 搜一搜 实时搜微信指数类目
      deprecated: false
      description: |
        {
            "keyword": "人民日报",
            "mode": 2,
            "BusinessType": 8192,
            "sub_search_type": 0,
            "key": "{{key}}",
            "verifycode": ""
        }
      tags:
        - 其他微信实时搜一搜相关接口
      parameters: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                keyword:
                  type: string
                  description: 指数关键词
                mode:
                  type: integer
                  description: 固定值 2
                BusinessType:
                  type: integer
                  description: 类目类型：固定值  8192（0.5/次）
                sub_search_type:
                  type: integer
                  description: 固定值 0
                key:
                  type: string
                  description: '极致了key '
                verifycode:
                  type: string
              required:
                - keyword
                - mode
                - BusinessType
                - sub_search_type
                - key
                - verifycode
              x-apifox-orders:
                - keyword
                - mode
                - BusinessType
                - sub_search_type
                - key
                - verifycode
            example:
              keyword: 人民日报
              mode: 2
              BusinessType: 8192
              sub_search_type: 0
              key: '{{key}}'
              verifycode: ''

                  cookies:
```
